name: Toulouse, France

rent.notes: Taxe d'habitation eliminated for primary residences.
rent.gigInternetNotes: Toulouse FTTH ~92%. France national leader in gig broadband adoption (60%+ of subscriptions). Fiber is standard, not premium. Tech hub city with high connectivity expectations.

electricity.notes: EDF. Moderate heating. Some A/C use (Toulouse summer highs 86°F).

gas.notes: Engie/GRDF. Natural gas heating (Nov–Mar). Toulouse has moderate winters.

sewage.notes: Included in water bill as assainissement collectif.

utilities.taxes: TVA included in bills: 5.5% on water/assainissement, 20% on electricity/gas.
utilities.notes: Electricity (heating+cooling), gas, water, sewage, trash. Internet is in entertainment (Cable+1Gig). Trash included in rent. Sewage included in water bill.

healthcare.notes: PUMA universal coverage + Mutuelle complémentaire (~€55-80/person/mo, higher tier for chronic conditions). ALD (Affection Longue Durée) provides 100% coverage for hypertension and diabetes. Macular degeneration: anti-VEGF injections covered 100% at hospital. Hypothyroidism monitoring covered. GLP-1 covered for diabetes indication.

petCare.notes: Vet visits, vaccinations, flea/tick, pet insurance

petDaycare.notes: Hired pet sitter 2 days/week (~€29/visit). Few commercial daycare facilities in Toulouse. In-home pet care via local garde d'animaux, Rover.com. CESU eligible for 50% tax credit.

petGrooming.notes: Bernese coat maintenance, professional grooming monthly

transportation.notes: Metro, tram, bus network; Tisséo transit pass

entertainment.notes: Incl cable+1Gig internet, Netflix, Amazon Prime, Apple TV+, NFL RedZone (DAZN), dining out (lunch for 2 2x/week w/ tax+tip)

phoneCell.notes: Google Fi Flexible (US Number) + Free Mobile (Local). 2 phones, 1.5GB+ high-speed data each, all taxes included.

buffer.notes: Monthly safety buffer for unexpected expenses

medicalOOP.notes: ALD status for hypertension/diabetes provides 100% Sécu coverage on related care. Anti-VEGF injections performed at hospital: 100% covered. Mutuelle covers ticket modérateur and dépassements d'honoraires. OOP mainly for non-remboursé items, some specialist surcharges, and comfort options.

medicine.notes: Monthly prescription medication costs for household

taxes.notes: Estimated monthly income tax on $72,000/yr household income. Based on jurisdiction's effective retiree rate; excludes sales/VAT/property tax.

stateIncomeTax.label: French Income Tax
stateIncomeTax.exemptions: US-France tax treaty. SS taxed only in France.

pros: 4th largest city with lower costs than Paris/Lyon
Aerospace hub (Airbus HQ) with international community
Pink city charm and vibrant food scene
cons: Less English spoken than major tourist cities
Complex French tax situation with US

exchangeRates.note: EUR per 1 USD. Based on 2016-2026 historical range. Optimistic = strong EUR (good for USD→EUR), Pessimistic = weak EUR.
